Section 88, , , prescribed age limits of twelve and eighteen for service as pages in House of Representatives but made the restriction inapplicable to chief pages, riding pages, and telephone pages. See .act Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 830, § 131 Stat. 968section 4901(b) of this title
